commands.purpose: Validate a set of already-created phase-wise Markdown research reports before ingest.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes only research-set manifests, normalized research-set records, and intake reports. Does not generate phase packets, approve work, call models, run worker prompts, or perform git actions.

commands.purpose: Convert Markdown research reports into phase packets, worker prompts, manifests, and index entries.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes only Discovery Lane generated artifacts. No model calls, browser automation, API calls, git actions, or phase execution.

commands.purpose: Convert one READY_FOR_INGEST research set into set-prefixed phase packets, worker prompts, manifests, and set ingest reports.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes derived Discovery Lane phase artifacts for the specified research set only. Does not approve work, create handoffs, create branches, execute workers, call models, commit, push, or merge.

commands.purpose: Plan human approval review for packets generated by one ingested research set.
commands.safety_behavior: Dry-run is read-only unless --write-report is explicitly used to write an advisory Markdown review plan. It does not approve packets, create handoffs, create branch plans, execute workers, create branches, call models, commit, push, or merge.

commands.purpose: List approved Discovery Lane handoff bundles and planned branch metadata.
commands.safety_behavior: Read-only. Does not execute workers, create branches, approve packets, commit, push, or merge.

commands.purpose: Build a non-executing execution queue manifest for one research set from individually approved handoffs.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes only an execution queue JSON manifest. Does not approve packets, create handoffs, create or checkout branches, execute workers, call models, commit, push, or merge.

commands.purpose: Build a non-executing execution queue manifest and Markdown report for one research set.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes only queue planning artifacts. It does not execute workers, create branches, checkout branches, approve packets, create handoffs, commit, push, or merge.

commands.purpose: List packets and approval state for human review.
Record human approval and create handoff, branch plan, and approval record.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes Discovery Lane approval artifacts only. Does not run git, execute workers, call models, or change branches.

commands.purpose: Record human rejection after external review.
commands.safety_behavior: Writes rejection record and packet snapshot only.

commands.purpose: Audit Discovery Lane structure, manifests, approvals, handoffs, branch plans, and execution boundaries.
commands.safety_behavior: Read-only. Does not write files, execute workers, call models, or run git.

commands.purpose: Show local Discovery Lane command help.
